CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2009 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2009 Continued To Jul-07-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The OSC is re-set to 7/7/2009 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Dismissal pending. Proceedings reported by: Denise L. Doucette, CSR# 5963. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-09-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-09-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-19-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Adam S. Gruen, Esq. appeared with plaintiff and cross-defendant Paula Eaton, who was placed under oath and examined.
Jan E. Bolt, Esq. appeared with defendant and cross-complainant David Shantz, and for defendant Graphita, Inc.
Defendant and cross-complainant David Shantz was placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 4, 2008.

Terms of the Settlement Agreement were read into the record by Mr. Gruen. In accordance with the agreement reached by the parties, defendants David Shantz and Graphity, Inc. shall pay plaintiff Paula Eaton the sum of $36,000.00 as follows: $10,000 shall be paid one week from today, or March 16, 2009. The balance of $26,000.00 shall be paid in thirty days, or April 9, 2009. Said payments shall be submitted directly to counsel for plaintiff, Adam S. Gruen, Esq. Each party shall bear their own attorney's fees and costs. CCP 664.4 applies. Plaintiff is responsible for all tax liabilities incurred by receipt of the afore-mentioned $36,000.00.

Both Ms. Eaton and Mr. Shantz were voir dired by the Court as to the terms and their understanding of the agreement.

Settlement Agreement reached by the parties shall be reduced to writing by Mr. Gruen.

Matter is continued to May 19, 2009 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.
